# y.k.a — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> Yossi Kazaz is an experienced business consultant operating under the brand y.k.a, specializing in serving small and medium-sized businesses. His core expertise includes building economic models, cash flow analysis and management, and preparing companies for sale through value enhancement. The brand projects professionalism, strategic thinking, and a results-driven approach tailored to business owners seeking growth and financial clarity.

## How to Contact Us

- Email: yossikazaz100@gmail.com
- Address: השחר 14, כפר סבא

### Contact form
- URL: https://example.com
- Endpoint: https://example.com/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel, required)
  - `message` (textarea)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About y.k.a
Yossi Kazaz is an experienced business consultant operating under the brand y.k.a, specializing in serving small and medium-sized businesses. His core expertise includes building economic models, cash flow analysis and management, and preparing companies for sale through value enhancement. The brand projects professionalism, strategic thinking, and a results-driven approach tailored to business owners seeking growth and financial clarity.

## Services/Products
- ייעוץ עסקי לחברות קטנות ובינוניות
- בניית מודל כלכלי
- בניית וניתוח תזרים מזומנים
- השבחת חברות לפני מכירה

## Target Audience
- חברות קטנות ובינוניות
- בעלי עסקים קטנים ובינוניים
- יזמים חדשים
- מנהלי עסקים בצמיחה

## Industry
ייעוץ עסקי
